lines.text: Control, Harmony. We're at the bottom of the last rise. [pause] Can't see over it yet, give us a minute here.
[flatly] Bet you it's more rocks. That's about all this whole box has been so far.
Copy your crest, Harmony, and we're standing by for your—
Control, Harmony. We have the site. There's... [hesitates] give me a second here.
Nobody touches anything. Control, you getting this down there, or is it just us.
[excited] Where's Earl and them at? They're missing the damnedest thing that ever happened.
— so if you'll bear with us one more minute here while they get the picture back up for us—
— I'm being told those suits are the museum pieces. [pause] From the gift program. They're wearing the gifts.
(reading) [deliberate] Old ideas. Old culture. Old customs. Old habits.
[excited] Those flags are NEW, people. Look at the COLORS. They SWAPPED them—
[warmly] Harmony. Took you boys long enough getting up here. Burgers are about done, come on and get one.
